title: Paw Patrol: Grand Prix
short_description: A family-friendly kart racer featuring the beloved Paw Patrol characters.
description: Paw Patrol: Grand Prix is a kart racing game based on the popular Nickelodeon animated series. Players can race as their favourite pups across tracks set in Adventure Bay and beyond, using power-ups and special abilities unique to each character. Designed for younger players and families, the game features split-screen multiplayer and an accessible control scheme. Published by Outright Games and developed by 3DClouds, it brings the Paw Patrol franchise to the racing genre.
